cards.name: Lightning Bolt
cards.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

cards.name: Lava Spike
cards.oracle_text: Lava Spike deals 3 damage to target player or planeswalker.

cards.name: Goblin Guide
cards.oracle_text: Haste. Whenever Goblin Guide attacks, defending player reveals the top card of their library.

cards.name: Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer
cards.oracle_text: Whenever Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token and exile the top card of that player's library.

cards.name: Brainstorm
cards.oracle_text: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

cards.name: Counterspell
cards.oracle_text: Counter target spell.

cards.name: Snapcaster Mage
cards.oracle_text: Flash. When Snapcaster Mage enters the battlefield, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn.

cards.name: Spell Pierce
cards.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}.

cards.name: Opt
cards.oracle_text: Scry 1, then draw a card.

cards.name: Thoughtseize
cards.oracle_text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland, nontoken card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life.

cards.name: Fatal Push
cards.oracle_text: Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less. Revolt — Destroy that creature if it has mana value 4 or less instead if a permanent you controlled left the battlefield this turn.

cards.name: Inquisition of Kozilek
cards.oracle_text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it with mana value 3 or less. That player discards that card.

cards.name: Tarmogoyf
cards.oracle_text: Tarmogoyf's power is equal to the number of card types among cards in all graveyards and its toughness is equal to that number plus 1.

cards.name: Noble Hierarch
cards.oracle_text: Exalted. {T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.

cards.name: Path to Exile
cards.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

cards.name: Swords to Plowshares
cards.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

cards.name: Wrenn and Six
cards.oracle_text: +1: Return up to one target land card from your graveyard to your hand. −1: Wrenn and Six deals 1 damage to any target. −7: You get an emblem with "Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have retrace."
